title: urbanoguarea sphenophylla
intro: Urbanoguarea sphenophylla, also known as the West African waterberry, is a plant species that belongs to the family Araliaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure and exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Urbanoguarea sphenophylla include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of the plant typically involve its leaves being extracted in water or oil, and it can be consumed as a tea or taken in capsule form to utilize its medicinal properties.
